author: JanGerritSchulz
body:
#### PR description:

This PR was co-developed by: @Parsifal-2045

This pull request introduces some changes and updates to the Patatrack pixel tracking targetting Phase-2:
- some new cuts and settings for Patatrack including a cut on the quadruplet-level in track building and ability to disable the various duplicate treatments in the CA
- restructuring and improvements to the duplicate treatment leading to better efficiency at the cost of increased duplicate rate
- tuning of the CA parameters to collect more hits in the barrel region

The improvements were discussed in a similar version to what is proposed here in a working meeting of the Tracking POG [here](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1657943/#2-updates-on-extended-ca-in-ph).

Note that this PR is effectively coupled with #51042 which introduces a DNN pixel track selection directly on the device. This will lead to an improved efficiency due to smarter fake removal and at the same time reduced fake rate. This PR instead increases the track quality and initial efficiency before track selection. The full improvement is hidden in the usual MTV plots as the current track selection gets rid most of the additional signal tracks. As a side effect the generally loser doublet and triplet cuts also increase the fake rate. The overall combined effect with #51042 was presented [here](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1680142/#92-update-on-pixel-track-dnn-a)

#### PR validation:

Running tracking validation for Run-3 and Phase-2 using the commands below leads to the results here:
- [Run-3 performance](https://jaschulz.web.cern.ch/Plots/NGT/PR_tests/2026_May_PatatrackDevelopments/TrackingValidation_Run3_TTbar_PU/)
- [Phase-2 performance](https://jaschulz.web.cern.ch/Plots/NGT/PR_tests/2026_May_PatatrackDevelopments/TrackingValidation_Phase2_TTbar_PU/)

Note: *The Run-3 validation shows some differences in the performance, however since this PR will enter CMSSW_20_X that should be irrelevant for the integration.*

**Run-3 validation:**
```bash
#!/bin/bash -ex

cmsDriver.py step2 -s HLT:@relval2026,VALIDATION:hltMultiTrackValidation \
         --conditions auto:phase1_2026_realistic \
         --datatier DQMIO \
         -n -1 \
         --eventcontent DQMIO \
         --geometry DB:Extended \
         --era Run3_2026 \
         --filein file:/eos/cms/store/relval/CMSSW_17_0_0_pre1/RelValTTbar_14TeV/GEN-SIM-DIGI-RAW/PU_160X_mcRun3_2026_realistic_v6_STD_2026_RegeneratedGS_PU_20260519_170938-v2/2590000/0227c321-792a-4aa0-8d5c-55d96a5e5943.root  \
         --fileout file:step2.root \
         --nThreads 24 \
         --process HLTX \
         --inputCommands='keep *, drop *_hlt*_*_HLT, drop triggerTriggerFilterObjectWithRefs_l1t*_*_HLT' \
         > step2.log  2>&1

cmsDriver.py step3 -s HARVESTING:postProcessorHLTtrackingSequence \
         --conditions auto:phase1_2026_realistic  \
         --mc \
         --geometry DB:Extended \
         --scenario pp \
         --filetype DQM \
         --era Run3_2026 \
         -n 1000  \
         --filein file:step2.root \
         --fileout file:step3.root > step3.log  2>&1
```

**Phase-2 validation:**
```bash
#!/bin/bash -ex

cmsDriver.py step_2 -s L1P2GT,HLT:75e33_trackingOnly,VALIDATION:@hltValidation \
         --mc \
         --conditions auto:phase2_realistic_T35 \
         --datatier DQMIO \
         -n -1 \
         --eventcontent DQMIO \
         --geometry ExtendedRun4D121 \
         --era Phase2C17I13M9 \
         --customise SLHCUpgradeSimulations/Configuration/aging.customise_aging_1000 \
         --filein file:/eos/cms/store/relval/CMSSW_16_1_0_pre2/RelValTTbar_14TeV/GEN-SIM-DIGI-RAW/PU_150X_mcRun4_realistic_v1_STD_D121_RegeneratedGS_PU-v1/2590000/02e107db-90d4-4d51-898a-1d0ae68ee54b.root \
         --fileout file:step2.root \
         --nThreads 24 \
         --process HLTX \
         --inputCommands='keep *, drop *_hlt*_*_HLT, drop triggerTriggerFilterObjectWithRefs_l1t*_*_HLT' \
         > step2.log  2>&1

cmsDriver.py step3 -s HARVESTING:postProcessorHLTtrackingSequence \
         --conditions auto:phase2_realistic_T35  \
         --mc \
         --geometry ExtendedRun4D121 \
         --scenario pp \
         --filetype DQM \
         --era Run3_2026 \
         -n 1000  \
         --filein file:step2.root \
         --fileout file:step3.root > step3.log  2>&1
```

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Not a backport.
title: [NGT] Improvements to Patatrack Pixel Tracking for Phase-2
